headline: From boots to bookings: Mastercard insights show where Calgary Stampede drives meaningful lift for local businesses
summary: New insights from the Mastercard Economics Institute (MEI) show the Calgary Stampede does more than draw crowds, it sets Calgary's economy in motion even before the gates open, from last-minute retail runs ahead of opening weekend to surging restaurant demand and early hotel bookings downtown.

raw.headline: From boots to bookings: Mastercard insights show where Calgary Stampede drives meaningful lift for local businesses

headline: Can Visa and Thredd Drive Faster Issuing Across the Asia Pacific?
